NextSteps_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "525962734F65F3136149CC884D2E643A", "With your first <Facility>Bed</> built, you can use its <Important>Info Panel</> to <Important>Sleep</> until a chosen <Important>Time of Day</>.


You now have several <Important>Objectives</> to work on in any order you like, so that you can continue to build up your <Important>Outpost</>. Remember to refer back to previous <Important>Tutorials</> if you feel stuck.


Paths between the <Important>Surface</> and the <Important>Underground</> are marked by a cave icon on the <Important>Compass</> at the bottom of the screen - as you rotate the camera, these icons will move to indicate where things are.

Your constructed <Facility>Habitats</> are also marked by icons on the <Important>Compass</> so that you can always find your way back to the <Important>Outpost</>.")
